subject: Gaming
title: Pac-Man Fever Grips the World
description: A fast breakdown of Pac-Man Fever Grips the World for builders.

hook.text: Pac-Man was designed to attract women and couples to arcades—a radical idea in 1980.

buildup.text: Creator Toru Iwatani wanted a non-violent game. He found inspiration in a pizza with one slice missing.

discovery.text: Each ghost has unique AI. Blinky chases directly, Pinky ambushes ahead, Inky flanks, Clyde wanders randomly.

twist.text: Pac-Man became more famous than the game itself—spawning a TV show, a hit song, and a cereal brand.

climax.text: It generated over $2.5 billion in quarters and became gaming's first genuine cultural icon.

punchline.text: A pizza with a missing slice became gaming's first superstar.

quiz.question: What inspired the design of Pac-Man?
options: A pizza with one slice missing
A bouncing ball in a maze
